title: Jakobstad Heavy Rain
lead: Jakobstad is experiencing a critical heavy rain event with a Z-Score of -3.03. This anomaly has a score of 10.0/10, indicating a severe weather condition.
body:
The current weather conditions in Jakobstad are characterized by heavy rain, with an humidity level of 96% and a wind speed of 10.1 km/h.
 The HDD value is 11.6 GG, while the CDD value is 0.0 GG, indicating a significant impact on the city's heating demands.
 The Level is marked as CRITICAL, requiring immediate attention and action to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to ensure public safety and minimize damage.
